title: Lucie UP - Sharing Portal app
excerpt:
While monday.com is excellent for internal teams, many of us struggle to maintain high security and simple, specific permissions when sharing sensitive data with dozens of external clients. 
We found the perfect solution…

posts.author: UgoEurotas (Ugo Omid)
posts.cookedHtml:
While monday.com is excellent for internal teams, many of us struggle to maintain high security and simple, specific permissions when sharing sensitive data with dozens of external clients.

We found the perfect solution for this complexity: an app that lets you create dedicated, secure portals for your external users, built right from your monday data.

Check out the Lucie UP - Sharing Portal app. It helps you solve the external sharing dilemma by letting you:

→ Set precise permissions that control visibility down to the individual column level for each external user.
→ Scale client visibility securely without needing to manage large volumes of guest seats or custom automations.
→ Offer a branded, dedicated experience where your external partners only see what they need, nothing more.

See how easy it is to set up a secure client portal: Calendly
(Schedule a demo)

Install Lucie UP from the monday.com Marketplace and solve the client visibility challenge today! Marketplace Link: Lucie UP - Sharing Portal - monday.com Marketplace
